channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Musk’s X Allies Launch News Channel MTS Live
item.description: MTS, announced on Monday, is the newest node of 24/7 information to monitor the situation.

item.title: Rivian Pitches Licensing Software To Automakers. The Android Of EVs?
item.description: Rivian reportedly wants to license its self-driving and operating software to automakers. Analysts are skeptical.

item.title: Tesla bolsters App with new safety, insurance, and storage features
item.description: Tesla is bolstering its smartphone App with a series of new features to streamline operations for owners. The new additions include fixes to safety, its in-house insurance offering, and storage management for Dashcam clips. The Tesla Smartphone App is one of the biggest and best features and adva...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi-only Superchargers are starting to appear
item.description: Tesla is starting to build out Robotaxi-only Superchargers as the company is truly leaning on its Full Self-Driving and autonomy efforts to solve passenger travel. Last week, the company filed pre-permits in Arizona’s East Valley for two dedicated, non-public charging sites stocked with next-gene...

item.title: Jeep shelves its only EV in the US for 2026, but promises it will return better than ever
item.description: Jeep’s only electric SUV in the US, the Wagoneer S, will not receive a 2026 model year. The company said it will return with major improvements. more…

item.title: Tesla's Earnings Reaction May Be More Subdued Than Usual
Elon Musk Says AI And Robotics Will Change Everything: 'Everyone Can Have A Penthouse If They Want'
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk is making a bold case for a future where artificial intelligence doesn't just improve the economy, but completely reshapes it to the point where even luxury living, like penthouses, could become widely accessible. In a...

item.title: Tesla to Report Q1 Earnings: Will Rising Y/Y Delivery Restore Growth?
item.description: TSLA heads into Q1 earnings with a year-over-year delivery rebound, fueled by a Germany surge, as rising volumes and margins aim to offset earlier declines.

item.title: Obi Releases New Data On Tesla Robotaxi Pricing In San Francisco
item.description: Tesla's Robotaxi service remains the least expensive ride-hailing option for travelers in San Francisco, but the average price of a ride has risen 41% since December according to new research from Obi, the global real-time aggregator for rideshare prices. Despite the sharp rise, Tesla remains the...

item.title: Tesla: The SpaceX IPO Won't Save This Stock From Gravity
Tesla's robotaxi roll-out and AI roadmap to steal the show as first-quarter results loom
item.description: AI progress and autonomous vehicle expansion set to dominate Wednesday's earnings call, says the bank. Tesla Inc's (NASDAQ:TSLA) artificial intelligence ambitions and the early-stage rollout of its robotaxi service will be the central focus when the electric vehicle maker reports its...

item.title: Tesla Got a Price Target Increase. Why an Analyst Still Says Hold.
item.description: It is a small move but investors might be waiting for earnings before deciding what’s next for Tesla stock.

item.title: Tesla is supposed to imminently unveil its new Roadster after years of delays
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk claims the long-awaited next-generation Roadster will finally be unveiled by the end of the month, which is days away. If it actually happens, it would come nearly nine years after the original prototype was first shown in November 2017. We’ve been down this road before — many...

item.title: Tesla submits plans for first Robotaxi-only Supercharger stations
item.description: Tesla has submitted permit applications for two private Supercharger stations in Arizona that would be dedicated exclusively to its Robotaxi fleet — marking the first time the automaker has planned charging infrastructure specifically for autonomous vehicles. The filings, discovered in municipal ...

item.title: Tesla Settles Fatal Crash Lawsuit in Florida
item.description: Company denies wrongdoing as case resolves before trial

item.title: How Tesla Stock Has Moved After The Last Few Earnings Reports
item.description: Tesla stock tends to be volatile around earnings, as investors parse CEO Elon Musk's words for updates about the rollout of FSD and robotaxis.

item.title: Tesla Full Self Driving (Supervised) Australian Style
item.description: My friend Arthur is a great proponent of electric vehicles, running EV shows in Rockhampton, having a regional centre in Queensland, writing for a local newspaper, and speaking on the local radio. He has been sharing his experiences with Tesla Full Self Driving (Supervised) both on country roads,...

item.title: Rivian Stock Is Outrageously Cheap -- Here's Why There Could Be 5,000% in Upside Potential
item.description: Tesla's valuation shows the potential of Rivian stock.

item.title: Is Tesla (TSLA) Pricing In Too Much Future Growth After Recent 1-Year Surge?
item.description: If you are wondering whether Tesla's share price reflects its true worth today, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what that current price might mean for value oriented investors. Tesla recently closed at US$392.50, with returns of 11.4% over 7 days, 6.7% over 30 days, a 10.4% de...

item.title: Volvo electric semi scores another real-world win with Coca-Cola
item.description: Pepsi may grab headlines with their Tesla tie-in, but arch rival Coca-Cola is quietly building an electric truck fleet of its own, and its Canadian fleet of bright red Volvo VNR Electric semis has just grown to more than forty! more…

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q1 2026 earnings preview: the growth story is dead
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results tomorrow (April 22) after the market close, with a conference call to follow. Despite leadership continuing to push the narrative that Tesla is now an “AI and robotics company,” the automotive business still drives the vast majori...

item.title: This "Magnificent Seven" Stock Will Be a Big Winner from the SpaceX IPO (Hint: It's Not Tesla)
item.description: Tesla could even be a big loser if SpaceX bumps it out of the "Magnificent Seven."

item.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Tesla, Ciena, Ubiquiti and Imperial Oil
item.description: Imperial Oil (IMO) in focus as oil prices stay elevated amid Iran tensions, with markets weighing energy risks, inflation pressure and global growth signals.

item.title: ARK’s SpaceX IPO Guide makes a compelling case on why $1.75T may not be the ceiling
item.description: ARK Invest, which holds SpaceX as its largest Venture Fund position at 17% of net assets, has published a detailed investor guide to why a SpaceX IPO may be grounded in a $1.75 trillion target valuation. The financial case starts with Starlink, SpaceX’s satellite internet constellation, which has...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Reports Q1: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
item.description: Electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) will be reporting earnings this Wednesday after market hours. Here’s what investors should know.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi expansion, heavy duty EVs, and last week’s pain at the pump
item.description: On today’s pumped-up episode of Quick Charge , we notice how funny it is that Tesla makes a big Robotaxi announcement every time the TSLA earnings call looks like a disappointment. more…

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck becomes first AC vehicle-to-grid asset in California through PG&E
item.description: PG&E and Tesla have announced that the Cybertruck is now approved to sell power back to California’s grid through the utility’s residential Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) pilot program. The approval comes with up to $4,500 in incentives toward equipment and installation costs. What makes this notabl...

item.title: Tesla settles another wrongful death lawsuit, but not about Autopilot this time
item.description: Tesla has settled a wrongful death lawsuit filed by the family of an 18-year-old passenger killed in a 116 mph crash in Fort Lauderdale. Plaintiffs alleged that a Tesla technician disabled a speed limiter without parental consent. The settlement, with undisclosed terms, was confirmed Monday just ...

item.title: The 3 Mag 7 Stocks with the Best Earnings Charts
item.description: Microsoft and Apple are earnings all-stars while Tesla remains in the doghouse.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Preview: Losing The Robotics Race
Tesla settles wrongful death lawsuit over crash that killed Florida teenager
item.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Elon Musk’s Tesla has settled a wrongful death lawsuit in Florida stemming from a 2018 high-speed crash that ‌killed a teenager riding in one of the electric vehicle maker's sedans, court records ‌show. A trial in the lawsuit was set to begin today in Florida state court ...

item.title: Did Ford CEO Jim Farley just take a shot at Tesla?
item.description: Electric vehicles have been on the minds of Ford's best thinkers for years, and on a recent podcast, CEO Jim Farley detailed the thought process behind some of the moves the company has made in recent quarters to right a nearly $20 billion wrong. Earlier this year, when Farley was asked why, afte...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings on Deck: What To Expect From Upcoming Report
item.description: Tesla Faces Pivotal Q1 Test With Cash Flow Fears

item.title: Ford CEO Farley says Tesla is not who to look at for EV expertise
item.description: Ford CEO Jim Farley said in a recent podcast interview that Tesla is not who Americans should look at to beat Chinese carmakers. The comments have sparked quite a bit of outrage from Tesla fans on X , the social media platform owned by Elon Musk. Farley said that Chinese automakers are better exa...

item.title: SpaceX wins its first MARS contract but it comes with a catch
item.description: NASA just signed a $175.7 million contract with SpaceX to launch a Mars rover that the White House is simultaneously trying to defund. The contract, awarded on April 16, 2026, tasks SpaceX’s Falcon Heavy with launching the European Space Agency’s (ESA) Rosalind Franklin rover from Kennedy Space C...

item.title: Tesla is last in the 'Magnificent 7' rally — and the first tech giant to report earnings: Chart of the Day
item.description: Since the broader market's March 30 low, Tesla is up only 11%, dead last among its "Magnificent Seven" tech peers.

item.title: As Tesla Tapes Out the AI5 Chip, Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold TSLA Stock?
item.description: Tesla's chip breakthrough strengthens its AI story, but high expectations still cloud the outlook.

item.title: Tesla Terafab AI Chips Add New Layer To High Valuation Debate
item.description: Tesla is expanding its in-house semiconductor effort through the Terafab AI chip complex, with new job postings highlighting work on advanced 2nm class AI chips. The Terafab facility is positioned to support Tesla's autonomous driving, robotics, and data center projects, with a goal of reducing r...

item.title: Bull vs Bear: Is Tesla Stock a Buy or Sell?
item.description: Here's a look at the bullish and bearish cases for Tesla stock.

item.title: Inside one of Amsterdam's first supervised self-driving Teslas
item.description: STORY: Kees Roelandschap navigates down the narrow streets of Amsterdam without his hands on the wheel of his Tesla. It follows the U.S. carmaker getting surprise approval from the Netherlands for its supervised full self-driving - or FSD - system It's a European first for city streets and could ...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings Are Due April 22. Is TSLA Stock a Buy Before the Report?
item.description: Ahead of the Q1 earnings, Tesla missed the street’s forecast on deliveries. Tesla delivered 358,023 vehicles during the quarter.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Need To Show 'Tangible Progress' In Scaling FSD, Morgan Stanley Says
item.description: To justify its lofty valuations, Tesla will need to show meaningful updates on efforts to scale its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software, according to Morgan Stanley. Shares fell on Monday.

item.title: Will Tesla’s FSD pivot save its margins? Q2 earnings preview
item.description: Stifel NextGen Transport Analyst, Stephen Gengaro, joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to tell investors what they should expect on Tesla's (TSLA) earnings call.

item.title: Tesla May Have a Big Surprise in Store for Investors on April 22
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) reports first-quarter 2026 results on April 22 after the market close. The bar for this quarter is more meaningful than usual. A year ago, Tesla delivered one of its worst earnings surprises on record, and the comparison now sets up a potential inflection point.

item.title: Can Q1 Earnings Push Tesla Stock Toward $600?
item.description: Tesla is set to report its first quarter earnings on April 22. Can a strong quarter revive the stock?

item.title: Tesla Q1 Earnings: What Elon Musk and Co. will answer during the call
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) is set to hold its Earnings Call for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, and there are a lot of interesting things that are swirling around in terms of speculation from investors. With the company’s executives, including CEO Elon Musk, answering a handful of questions t...

item.title: Here’s Why Rowan Street Capital Holds Steady on Tesla (TSLA)
item.description: Rowan Street Capital, an investment management company, released its Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The first quarter of 2026 left investors with plenty of concerns.

item.title: Will SpaceX steal the show during Tesla's earnings call?
item.description: Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman and Myles Udland discuss how Tesla (TSLA) earnings expectations have changed over time, and whether Elon Musk or SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) will take the spotlight this quarter.

item.title: Tesla’s EV Rebound Just Got Real — Iran War Sends EV Demand Soaring
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have tightened the global oil spigot once more. The U.S. maintains its naval blockade of Iranian ports, Iran fired on two tankers in the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend, and the U.S.

item.title: Week ahead: Tesla earnings, Iran tensions, and Fed drama test fragile market rally
item.description: Wall Street heads into the new week juggling three major forces: a packed earnings calendar, fast-moving geopolitical risks in the Middle East, and a series of macro events that could shape interest rate expectations. Even after the S&P 500 ended last week at a record high, sentiment is...
